description.value:
You access the third and final arsenal of your Pod, commanding it to utilize more diverse options. Once, during the duration of this jutsu, your Pod can grant you one of the following benefits, at which point this jutsu then ends:

  • A100 - Decoy: Your Pod creates a detailed mimicry meant to draw attention towards itself and away from you. An identical holographic duplicate of yourself and up to three other creatures is created within 5 feet of your Pod. These copies act in a manner of your choosing, and create sight and sounds of your design. Physical interaction reveals them to be copy, and each can be seen through if a creature makes an Illusions check against it as an action.
  • A110 - Slow: Your Pod creates a field that distorts time in a minor way, warping the area and slowing down enemies that enter its vicinity. Select a space within 90 feet of you. All hostile creatures within 45 feet of that area must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, they are moved down one place in initiative, have their movement speed halved, and gain three ranks of Slowed. These effects are ended once they leave the area, and while within this area they can remake their saving throw at the end of each of their turns.

  • R020 - Mirage: Your Pod analyzes all enemies within a radius around you, allowing you to follow up with a series of devastating slashes to all that remain within. When you would make a weapon attack, all creatures within a 60 foot radius sphere centered on you become the target of that weapon attack. After this weapon attack is made, you can spend a bonus action or reaction to force all creatures within range to make a Dexterity saving throw, taking Xd8+X of your weapon's damage type on a failure.
    (X = your Dexterity or Intelligence modifier)

  • A120 - Repair: Your Pod manifests a temporary beam of light, healing you and your allies, so long as they remain within a small radius. As a bonus action, you can grant this benefit to yourself and up to two allied creatures within range. Your Pod cannot gain this benefit for itself. At the start and end of their next turn, an affected creature regains Xd4+X hit points and are cleared of one condition of your choice that was not self-inflicted.
    (X = your Dexterity or Intelligence modifier)

  • A170 - Scanner: Your Pod begins to emit ultrasonic waves, enabling you to see that which was previously unseen. Until the end of your next turn, you gain 60 feet of tremorsense, gain a +5 to Perception checks, increase your passive Perception by +5, and can sense all items and creatures within this range that are touching the ground or buried within it, regardless of the result of any stealth checks made.
